booking.name: Full name
booking.errGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
booking.unavailableSub: This booking link isn't active. Please contact the practice.
booking.confirmedNote: The practice will contact you if needed. Please arrive a few minutes early.

deleteAccount.title: Delete your account
deleteAccount.intro: You can request the permanent deletion of your Blackpine account and all associated data.
deleteAccount.item2: All your patients, appointments, prescriptions and documents
deleteAccount.item4: Your secretary accounts, booking link and settings
deleteAccount.irreversible: This action is permanent and irreversible. No recovery is possible.
deleteAccount.confirmLabel: To confirm, type your email address ({{email}}):
deleteAccount.doneSub: Your account and data have been permanently deleted. Redirecting…
deleteAccount.loginPrompt: Sign in to your account to delete it.
deleteAccount.orEmail: Can't sign in? Email us at

auth.headline: Less paperwork. More time for your patients.
auth.valueProp: Your whole practice in one app, built for doctors in Morocco.
auth.feat2: Patient records, prescriptions & certificates in one click
auth.feat4: Online booking with your own personalized link
auth.feat5: Encrypted data — only you can access it
auth.feat6: Android, Web & offline, synced in real time
auth.footer: © 2026 Blackpine — Built for doctors in Morocco
auth.syncNote: Data synced with the Android app
auth.signupCodeSent: Code sent. Check your inbox (and spam).
auth.forgotSub: Enter your email to receive a reset code.
auth.resetSub: Enter the code received by email and choose a new password.
auth.codeSent: A 6-digit code has been sent to your email.
auth.passReset: Password reset successfully. You can now sign in.
auth.secretarySub: Enter the invitation code provided by the doctor.
auth.secretaryCodeHint: 6-character code generated by the doctor in Settings.
auth.secretaryLoginSub: Sign in with your username and password.

patientDetail.tlEmptySub: Consultations, exams, prescriptions and certificates will appear here.
patientDetail.consultationsEmptySub: This patient's consultations will appear here.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Profile & preferences
settings.securitySub: How your patients' data is protected
settings.secEncDesc: Your patients' names, records and appointments are encrypted before being stored. The server only keeps unreadable data — even we cannot read it.
settings.secTlsDesc: Every exchange between your device and the server is encrypted end-to-end, just like a banking app.
settings.secAccessDesc: Login protected by password, secretary PIN and granular permissions. Each practice's data is fully isolated from every other.
settings.secOwnDesc: Automatic backups and a full export of your data at any time. It is never sold or shared with third parties.
settings.secFooter: Architecture built to health-data protection best practices. Dedicated local or regional hosting is available on request.
settings.darkHint: Reduces eye strain during evening consultations
settings.locationsSub: Manage your consultation locations (main office, clinic, home…)
settings.locNamePlaceholder: e.g. Main office, Ibn Sina Clinic…
settings.consultationTypesSub: Choose which types appear in the visit type selector
settings.priceHint: The fee set here is pre-filled by default when billing each appointment type.
settings.customDrugsSub: Add your frequently prescribed drugs to the prescription autocomplete
settings.acteCodesSub: Define your own act codes (e.g. C, CS, K50) with label and fee. Offered when billing.
settings.docFormatSub: Customise the layout of invoices and prescriptions.
settings.docLayoutHint: "Letterhead" hides your details (for pre-printed paper). "Compact" reduces margins.
settings.docHeaderNotePlaceholder: E.g.: Member of the Moroccan Society of Cardiology
settings.docFooterNotePlaceholder: E.g.: Thank you for your trust
settings.docPreviewHint: Live preview of the header on your invoices and prescriptions.
settings.drugsAddPlaceholder: Drug name, dosage… e.g. Losartan 50 mg tab
settings.secretaryModeSub: Restrict access to the schedule and daily tasks — ideal for your receptionist
settings.secretaryDesc: In secretary mode, only the schedule, patients (read-only) and daily tasks are accessible. Medical, financial data and settings remain hidden.
settings.permRecordVitalsHint: Enter vital signs: blood pressure, weight, height, temperature, SpO₂…
settings.permHandleBillingHint: Take payment, mark appointments billed and print invoices/receipts.
settings.permEditPatientsHint: Create and edit patient records (contact details).
settings.secretaryPinHint: A 4-digit PIN protects the return to doctor mode
settings.enablePinHint: Without a PIN, anyone can exit secretary mode
settings.remoteSecretaryDesc: Your secretary signs in from her own device with a permanent account (username + password). She has access to the agenda, patients and waiting room, without seeing finances.
settings.inviteCodeHint: Valid for 48 hours. Share it with your secretary.
settings.inviteRevokeConfirm: Revoke all secretary access? Active sessions will be logged out.
settings.inviteShareHint: Share this code with your secretary — they enter it under "Secretary area" on the login screen.
settings.acctDesc: Create a username and password for your secretary. No expiry, revocable any time.
settings.acctShareHint: Give the username and password to your secretary — they sign in under "Secretary area".
settings.bookingSubtitle: Let patients book appointments via a public link
settings.bookingDesc: Enable a booking link to share (website, WhatsApp, social). Patients pick a free slot; the appointment appears in your agenda.
settings.bookingShareHint: Share this link with your patients (click to copy).
settings.bookingSlugHint: Use your name instead of a random string — e.g. “dr-amine-tazi”. Letters, numbers and hyphens only.
settings.smsSubtitle: Text patients a reminder before their appointment
settings.smsDesc: A reminder SMS is sent automatically to patients the day before their appointment. Requires an SMS provider configured on the server.
settings.smsNotConfigured: No SMS provider configured on the server — reminders won't be sent until credentials are added.
settings.smsConsent: Make sure your patients have consented to receive SMS. Per-message charges apply via your provider.
settings.acctShareNote: The password won't be shown again. Copy it and give it to your secretary.
settings.autoBackupsSub: The cabinet is backed up to the server every day. Restore an earlier version in case of a mistake or accidental deletion.
settings.autoBackupsEmpty: No backups yet. They appear after your first day of use.
settings.restoreConfirm: Restore the backup from {{date}}? The current state is saved first, then replaced.
settings.pinMismatch: The two PINs do not match.
settings.pinRemoveConfirm: Remove the secretary PIN? Secretary mode will be disabled.
settings.backupSub: Export or restore all clinical and financial data
settings.exportCabinetHint: Patients, appointments, prescriptions, exams, certificates, stock, notes…
settings.exportFinancesHint: Transactions, fixed assets and recurring rules
settings.exportPatientsCsvHint: Download the full patient list in CSV format
settings.exportApptsCsvHint: Download all appointments with billing and clinical notes
settings.exportAgendaIcsHint: Import all appointments into Google Calendar, Outlook or Apple Calendar
settings.importCabinetHint: Replaces all clinical data from a previously exported Cabinet.json file
settings.importFinancesHint: Replaces all transactions from a previously exported Finances.json file
settings.importPreviewWarn: ⚠️ This action will replace current cabinet data.
settings.clearPatientHint: {{n}} patient records will be permanently deleted
settings.deleteConfirmAppts: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {{n}} appointments?
settings.deleteConfirmPatients: Are you sure you want to permanently delete all {{n}} patients?
settings.exportBeforeDelete: Consider exporting your data before proceeding.
settings.installAppSub: Access Blackpine as a native app
settings.appInstalledHint: Blackpine is installed on your device
settings.installCanHint: Click to add the app to your home screen or desktop
settings.installManualHint: Open this site in Chrome/Edge/Safari and use 'Add to Home Screen'
settings.offlineHint: Cabinet data is available without internet. Sync resumes when back online.
settings.pwaDesc: Install Blackpine on your home screen for offline access.

pd.title: Advanced page layout (pre-printed paper)
pd.desc: Position each block to the millimetre to match your letterhead paper: drag blocks on the preview, set margins, add your logo.
pd.flowHint: This document spans several pages: set the margins, logo and background model, and hide the header or footer if your paper already carries them. Free block positioning isn't available here.
pd.hint: Drag a block to position it (mm from the page edge). Untick a block to skip printing it — useful when your pre-printed paper already carries the header. ⟲ returns a block to its automatic position.
pd.letterheadTip: Tip: if your paper already carries your letterhead, untick “Header” and increase the top margin.
pd.bgTip: Upload a scan of your letterhead paper to line the blocks up exactly. The background prints only if you tick “Print background” (not needed on pre-printed paper).

optimisation.title: Tax optimization
optimisation.subtitle: Personalized tips · {{year}}
optimisation.simSub: If I add additional deductible expenses…
optimisation.simNote: * Simulation based on {{regime}} regime. CM is not reduced by expenses.
optimisation.tipUnbilledDesc: You have {{n}} completed consultation{{s}} without associated revenue. Each unbilled appointment understates your actual income.
optimisation.tipCnopsDesc: AMO/CNOPS reimbursements are pending. Follow up with CNOPS to collect the amounts owed.
optimisation.tipReviewDesc: These transactions have an uncertain deductibility status. Review them to maximize your deductible expenses.
optimisation.tipAssetsDesc: No fixed assets recorded. Equipment depreciation is deductible. MAD 15,000 of equipment at 20% represents {{charge}} annual expense.
optimisation.tipRecurDesc: Your rent, professional insurance, phone plan and subscriptions are not recorded. Configure them to automatically include them in your calculation.
optimisation.tipRatioDesc: Medical practices typically spend 35–50% of revenue on deductible expenses. You are at {{rate}}%. Bringing this ratio to 40% would represent {{extra}} in additional expenses and {{saving}} in tax savings.
optimisation.tipBracketDesc: {{amount}} in additional deductible expenses would move your fiscal result into the {{rate}}% bracket, saving approximately {{saving}}.
optimisation.tipUpperDesc: You can generate {{amount}} in additional revenue before entering the {{rate}}% bracket.
optimisation.tipGoodDescEmpty: Add transactions for {{year}} to receive personalized tips.
optimisation.tipGoodDesc: No major optimization detected. Continue recording your expenses regularly.

calculateurs.title: Calculators
calculateurs.subtitle: Clinical decision-support tools
calculateurs.dfgDisclaimer: CKD-EPI 2021 equation (race-free). Use on a stable creatinine — not in acute kidney injury.
calculateurs.cvAgeWarn: ⚠️ This estimator applies to patients aged 40 to 80.
calculateurs.cvDisclaimer: Orientating clinical estimate (simplified Framingham approach). For a precise assessment, use the ESC SCORE2 tables adapted to the patient's geographic region.
calculateurs.grossDdrHint: First day of last menstrual period
calculateurs.grossFuture: ⚠️ The LMP is in the future.
calculateurs.poidsCurrentHint: To calculate the difference from ideal weight
